params.name: Red Star Design Award
params.description: The Red Star Award, jointly initiated by the China Industrial Design Association, Beijing Industrial Design Promotion Center, and New Economy Guide Magazine, has become one of the most authoritative and influential design awards in China, known as the Oscars of the Chinese design industry. The award aims to promote design innovation and enhance standards, focusing not only on the innovation and practicality of design but also on its market competitiveness and impact on improving quality of life. …
